assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Step 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify cluster state, current versions, node pools, health checks, and system pods status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 includes the command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --format="yaml(channels)"' to check available versions for Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 includes the command 'kubectl api-resources --verbs=list --namespaced -o name | xargs -n 1 kubectl get --show-kind --ignore-not-found -A' to check for deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 3.1 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --master --cluster-version=1.33 --zone=$ZONE --project=$PROJECT_ID'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3.3 includes verification commands to check master version and test kubectl connectivity with specific commands to verify the control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 4.1 and 4.4 provide specific gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools (default-pool and workload-pool) using 'gcloud container clusters upgrade' with --node-pool flag

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 4.2 and 4.5 include monitoring commands like 'watch "kubectl get nodes -o wide"' and operations list commands to track upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows a direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, and the node pool upgrades automatically follow to match the control plane version

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 5 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes an 'Emergency Rollback' section explaining limitations of control plane rollback and providing guidance on creating new node pools if needed, plus troubleshooting section
